title: My name is James. I like hiking. Please ...

messages.content: My name is James. I like hiking. Please be concise
Hi James, it's nice to meet you. I'm happy to chat about hiking. What kind of hikes do you enjoy? Trail difficulty, terrain, or specific locations?
Mountain hiking is a great choice, James. Have you ever hiked to the summit of a particular mountain, or do you prefer more leisurely climbs?
